raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A red ball, a yellow bottle, and a blue container are on a wooden table. The red ball is on the left, the yellow bottle is in the center, and the blue container is on the right. The yellow bottle is a rigid object with a body and a cap. STRATEGY - Reach the yellow bottle, grasp its body for a stable hold, transport it to the blue container, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the bottle during transport or misplacing it outside the container. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bottle body; Step 2 grasp the bottle body; Step 3 transport to the container; Step 4 place inside the container.
Goal: inside(yellow_bottle, blue_container)
Scene: red_ball, yellow_bottle, blue_container, table
Step 1: reach(yellow_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow bottle
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_bottle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_bottle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow bottle
  contact: holding(yellow_bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_bottle)
Step 3: transport(yellow_bottle -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  spatial: above(yellow_bottle, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_bottle)
  done_when: above(yellow_bottle, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_bottle -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_bottle, blue_container) [completion]; released(yellow_bottle) [completion]
  pose: inside(yellow_bottle, blue_container) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_bottle, blue_container) AND released(yellow_bottle)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow bottle
the body of the yellow bottle
an empty area inside the blue container
an empty area inside the blue container
